ui.brandSub: A collection of interactive visualizations that break down how technology works, step by step, for beginners.
ui.emptyTitle: Pick a topic on the left
ui.emptyDesc: Each topic is a standalone interactive page — click one in the sidebar to start learning.

tcpIpLayers.title: A Packet's Journey: TCP/IP Point to Point
tcpIpLayers.desc: How data gets wrapped (encapsulation) and unwrapped (decapsulation) as it travels from one host to another.

dns.title: DNS: The Internet's Phonebook
dns.desc: How your browser translates human-readable domain names into machine-readable IP addresses.

asymmetricEncryption.title: Asymmetric Encryption: Public & Private Keys
asymmetricEncryption.desc: Why locking with one key and unlocking with another solves both secret messaging and digital signatures.

blockchain.title: Blockchain & Consensus
blockchain.desc: How a decentralized chain of blocks secures data using cryptographic hashes and network consensus.

httpsTls.title: HTTPS/TLS: Handshake, Certificates & Encryption
httpsTls.desc: Four scenarios: the full TLS handshake, the certificate chain of trust, TLS 1.2 vs 1.3, and a man-in-the-middle attack simulation.

eventDrivenArchitecture.title: Event-Driven Architecture: Pub/Sub, Queues & Resilience
eventDrivenArchitecture.desc: Four scenarios: the basic publish/subscribe pattern, event queues for async processing, choreography vs orchestration, and why this architecture resists partial failure.

multithreading.title: Multithreading: Running Tasks Concurrently
multithreading.desc: How computers split work into multiple threads, and how to prevent chaos when they share data.

dockerVsVm.title: Docker vs. Virtual Machines
dockerVsVm.desc: A side-by-side comparison of how containers eliminate the heavy OS overhead required by traditional VMs.

aotVsJit.title: AOT vs JIT: When Does Compilation Happen?
aotVsJit.desc: Four scenarios: the AOT compilation pipeline, the JIT pipeline, the impact on startup & warm-up, and the adaptive optimization that can make JIT faster than AOT.

git.title: Git: Commits, Branches, Merges & Conflicts
git.desc: Five real scenarios: the basic commit workflow, branching & merging, merge conflicts, reset vs revert, and rebase vs merge.

llm.title: LLM: How Large Language Models Think
llm.desc: How large language models process a prompt from raw text to response — tokenization, embedding, attention, and token generation.
